Players By Position

Age Distribution

Top Team Average PPR

Average uses each team's top 20 projected PPR values. Invalid team labels are excluded.

Tier Drop-Offs

These are cliffs after a projection tier ends. Waldman year 1 points are the default basis; switch to Clay if you want to recalculate tiers from his projection set. Open a row to see the players in that tier.

Upside is the source ceiling score; Downside is the source miss-risk score. Higher numbers mean more of that trait. Auction values assume 12 teams, $200 budgets, super-super-flex depth, PPR, TE premium, and strategic 3-deep QB/RB/WR/TE targets. Bid+ means an analyst target signal; Bid++ means a stronger signal such as Harmon SUPER BUY or multiple target signals. Hover or click a Bid marker for the source.

Filtered Top Fpts

Filtered Position Mix

Waldman mode keeps workbook tier colors. Kyle mode uses the supplied rankings and tier shading. FantasyPros mode uses the imported 2026 dynasty ECR CSV.

Best Team Builder

Builds a 25-player roster using tier-banded bid values plus the selected premium. Shape controls whether the optimizer chases premium stars, balances spend, or leans into younger mid-priced breakout profiles. Age cap excludes players with known ages above the selected limit. Players marked Avoid are excluded; My Want Queue boosts marked targets.

Use values as anchors Raise or lower live targets when the room is paying more or less by position.Spend for elite tiers It is acceptable to beat value for a player you want if the roster build still works.Keep endgame leverage A few extra dollars matter when the room is stuck at $1 bids.Avoid flat mid-tier prices If 6th-10th round profiles are getting bid up, pivot to similar cheaper bets.

Fast Auction

Click a team header or summary to inspect that roster. Bot profiles can be changed in Team Summary. Sim buttons complete one or ten full nomination-and-sale cycles. The board scrolls horizontally so you can compare every team at once.

League scoring

Mike Clay projections are imported from ESPN's 2026 NFL projection guide PDF. The Cheatsheets tab also derives Clay position ranks and tiers from these projections using the active scoring settings.
